	public singlePKValue():string {
		const id = this.id;
		if (id === undefined || id === null) {
			throw new Error('Cannot get single PK value for unsaved Transaction.');
		}
		return String(id);
	}
	public identifierColumns(): string[] {
		return [ TransactionBase.COL_ID ];
	}

	set data(nVal: Record<string, unknown>) { this._set(TransactionBase.COL_DATA, nVal); }
